# Pointe Mobile Detailing

> Premier mobile car detailing service serving Metro Detroit — primarily Grosse Pointe and surrounding communities. We come to you. No shop drop-off needed.

Pointe Mobile Detailing is a professional mobile detailing company based in the Grosse Pointe area of Metro Detroit, Michigan. We specialize in high-quality interior and exterior detailing performed at the customer's home, office, or any location of their choice. Our team brings professional-grade equipment and products directly to your vehicle.

- Website: https://pointemobiledetailing.com
- Book online: https://pointemobiledetailing.com/#booking
- Email: pointemobiledetailing@gmail.com
- Phone: 313-686-3911
- Service area: Metro Detroit, Michigan — primarily Grosse Pointe and surrounding communities

## Services & Pricing

All prices listed are base prices for standard vehicles (Sedan, Coupe, Convertible). Larger vehicles carry an upcharge (see Vehicle Upcharges below). Prices are starting rates and may vary by vehicle condition.

### Pointe Elite — starting at $275
Our premium full-detail package. The best we offer. Includes a thorough exterior hand wash, clay bar treatment, interior deep clean, leather conditioning, and carpet shampoo. Your vehicle leaves looking showroom-fresh. Best for vehicles that need a full restoration of appearance or for owners who want the best possible result.

### Signature Shine — starting at $165
Our most popular service. A professional-grade exterior hand wash with foam cannon pre-soak, tire and wheel detail, window cleaning inside and out, interior wipe-down, and vacuum. Perfect for regular maintenance and keeping your vehicle looking its best.

### Interior Refresh — starting at $95
A deep focus on the inside of your vehicle. Includes full vacuum, steam cleaning, carpet spot treatment, interior surface wipe-down, window cleaning, and odor elimination. Great for families, pet owners, or anyone whose interior needs a reset.

### Exterior Clean — starting at $55
A fast and thorough exterior-only wash. Foam cannon pre-soak, hand wash, rinse, wheel scrub, and towel dry. Ideal for keeping your car looking clean between full details.

### Boat Detailing — pricing by quote only
Specialized marine detailing package. Includes hull wash and polish, cockpit cleaning, upholstery wipe-down, stainless steel brightening, and engine bay rinse. Protects your boat from water, salt, and UV damage. Contact us directly for a custom quote: pointemobiledetailing@gmail.com

## Vehicle Upcharges

Larger vehicles require more time and product. The following upcharges are added to the base service price:

- SUV: +$25
- Truck: +$25
- Minivan: +$25
- Van: +$45
- Sedan, Coupe, Convertible, Motorcycle: no upcharge
- RV: contact for quote

## Add-On Services

- Severe Odor Treatment: +$20 (deep deodorization for smoke, pets, mildew)
- Clay Bar Treatment: +$25 (removes bonded contaminants from paint surface)
- One Step Ceramic Coating: +$45 (adds a protective ceramic layer for long-lasting shine and paint protection)
- Tire Shine: +$10 (glossy finish applied to tires)

## Recurring Service Discounts

- Weekly bookings: 20% off
- Bi-weekly bookings: 15% off
- Monthly bookings: 10% off

## Hours of Operation

- Monday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Tuesday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Wednesday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Thursday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Payment Methods

We accept: Cash, Venmo, Stripe (credit/debit card), and Check.

## Booking

Appointments can be booked online at https://pointemobiledetailing.com/#booking. Customers select their service, vehicle type, date, time, and service location. We come to you — home, office, or anywhere convenient.

For boat detailing, special requests, or pricing questions, email pointemobiledetailing@gmail.com.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you come to my location?**
Yes. We are fully mobile. We bring all equipment and supplies to your home, office, driveway, or any location in the Metro Detroit area.

**How do I book?**
Book online at https://pointemobiledetailing.com/#booking or email pointemobiledetailing@gmail.com.

**How much does detailing cost?**
Exterior Clean starts at $55, Interior Refresh at $95, Signature Shine at $165, and Pointe Elite at $275. Larger vehicles have upcharges. Boat detailing is priced by quote.

**What areas do you serve?**
Metro Detroit, Michigan — primarily Grosse Pointe and surrounding communities.

**What is the difference between your packages?**
Exterior Clean is a basic exterior wash. Interior Refresh focuses solely on the interior. Signature Shine covers both exterior and interior at a maintenance level. Pointe Elite is a full premium detail including clay bar, leather conditioning, carpet shampoo, and interior deep clean.

**Do you offer recurring services?**
Yes. 20% off weekly, 15% off bi-weekly, 10% off monthly.

**Do you detail boats?**
Yes. Marine detailing is priced by quote — contact pointemobiledetailing@gmail.com.

**What payment methods do you accept?**
Cash, Venmo, Stripe (credit/debit card), and Check.

**Can you remove bad smells from my car?**
Yes. Severe Odor Treatment add-on (+$20) handles smoke, pet odors, mildew, and other deep odors.

**Do you offer ceramic coating?**
Yes. One Step Ceramic Coating add-on (+$45) provides a protective ceramic layer for long-lasting shine and paint protection.

**How long does a detail take?**
Exterior Clean: ~1 hour. Interior Refresh: ~1.5 hours. Signature Shine: ~2 hours. Pointe Elite: ~4 hours. Boat: ~5 hours.

## About Us

Pointe Mobile Detailing is a locally owned mobile detailing business serving Grosse Pointe and greater Metro Detroit. We are not a chain or franchise — we are a local team that takes pride in every vehicle we work on. We prioritize quality, convenience, and customer satisfaction.
